markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Joelinton: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Joelinton records at least 1+ goals during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Newcastle vs Chelsea professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Newcastle vs Chelsea professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 14, 2026.
